intent: Report-only QA — drives the running app in a real browser, files a prioritised defect list with repro and evidence, and changes no code.

dimensions.name: report-only
dimensions.criterion: Makes no code changes — it reports, it does not fix.

dimensions.name: browser-driven
dimensions.criterion: Drives the running app in a real browser.

dimensions.name: evidence
dimensions.criterion: Each defect carries reproduction steps and evidence.
